$schema: EastCondos icon library manifest — single source of truth.
style: Modern Luxe hairline line-art: charcoal #1A1A2E strokes + one amber #D4A843 accent, transparent 512px PNG.
usage: Website: <EcIcon name="..." />. Pipeline/AI: query cp_icons in Supabase or read this file. Pick by matching the concept to `keywords` — do NOT open the PNG to guess.

categories.process-transaction: Steps, documents, actions in a deal
categories.advisory-brand: Strategy, trust, growth, the advisory edge
categories.property-attributes: Features and ongoing costs of a property

icons.name: building-new
icons.label: New launch building
icons.description: A modern condo tower under/just after construction.

icons.name: hdb-block
icons.label: HDB block
icons.description: A public-housing apartment block (HDB flats).

icons.name: condo-tower
icons.label: Condo tower (resale)
icons.description: A sleek private condominium tower; existing/resale private home.

icons.name: landed-house
icons.label: Landed house
icons.description: A two-storey landed terrace home.

icons.name: show-gallery
icons.label: Showflat / show gallery
icons.description: A model home on a display stand; a developer showflat.

icons.name: skyline
icons.label: District skyline
icons.description: A cluster of condo towers; district or island-wide market view.

icons.name: stamp-duty
icons.label: Stamp duty (BSD/ABSD)
icons.description: A document with a pressed stamp; buyer's and additional buyer's stamp duty.

icons.name: balance-scale
icons.label: Affordability / TDSR
icons.description: A balanced weighing scale; affordability and debt-servicing balance.

icons.name: coins-stack
icons.label: Downpayment / cash
icons.description: Rising stacks of coins; downpayment, cash outlay, deposit.

icons.name: piggy-bank
icons.label: Savings
icons.description: A piggy bank; saving up, nest egg, setting money aside.

icons.name: home-loan
icons.label: Home loan / mortgage
icons.description: A house with a coin; taking a housing loan / mortgage.

icons.name: bridging-loan
icons.label: Bridging loan
icons.description: An arched bridge; bridging finance between selling and buying.

icons.name: wallet
icons.label: Cash on hand
icons.description: An open wallet with cash; money on hand, budget, spending power.

icons.name: bank
icons.label: Bank / lender
icons.description: A columned bank building; the bank, lender, loan approval.

icons.name: interest
icons.label: Interest rate
icons.description: Interest / cost of borrowing.

icons.name: cpf
icons.label: CPF
icons.description: Central Provident Fund used for property.

icons.name: property-tax
icons.label: Property tax
icons.description: Annual property tax.

icons.name: rent
icons.label: Rent / rental
icons.description: Rental income or rent paid.

icons.name: consultation
icons.label: Consultation / chat
icons.description: Two speech bubbles; a conversation, advisory chat, discovery call.

icons.name: checklist
icons.label: Checklist
icons.description: A clipboard with ticks; steps, requirements, eligibility checklist.

icons.name: calendar
icons.label: Timeline / dates
icons.description: A calendar; dates, timeline, MOP date, milestones.

icons.name: otp-document
icons.label: Option to Purchase
icons.description: A contract page with a signature line; the OTP / sale agreement.

icons.name: signing-pen
icons.label: Signing / commit
icons.description: A pen signing; committing, exercising the option, closing.

icons.name: handover
icons.label: Key handover
icons.description: A hand offering a key; collection, handover, moving in.

icons.name: key
icons.label: Ownership / keys
icons.description: A key; ownership, your own home, access.

icons.name: calculator
icons.label: Calculate / numbers
icons.description: A calculator; run the numbers, costs, sums.

icons.name: magnifier
icons.label: Search / review
icons.description: A magnifier; search, due diligence, look closely.

icons.name: exit-door
icons.label: Exit / selling
icons.description: An exit door; selling, exit strategy, getting out.

icons.name: mrt
icons.label: MRT / transport
icons.description: A train; MRT, connectivity, transport access.

icons.name: school
icons.label: Schools
icons.description: A graduation cap; schools, education, 1km enrolment.

icons.name: swimming-pool
icons.label: Pool / facilities
icons.description: A pool; condo facilities, lifestyle, amenities.

icons.name: gym
icons.label: Gym / fitness
icons.description: A dumbbell; gym, fitness facilities.

icons.name: park
icons.label: Park / greenery
icons.description: A tree; parks, greenery, nature nearby.

icons.name: expressway
icons.label: Expressway / roads
icons.description: A highway; expressway access, driving connectivity.

icons.name: sea-coast
icons.label: East Coast / sea
icons.description: Ocean waves; the East Coast, sea view, coastal living.

icons.name: shopping-mall
icons.label: Malls / shopping
icons.description: A shopping bag; malls, retail, amenities nearby.

icons.name: location-pin
icons.label: Location
icons.description: A map pin; location, where, address, area.

icons.name: target
icons.label: Goal / target
icons.description: A bullseye; your goal, the right target, precision.

icons.name: compass
icons.label: Strategy / direction
icons.description: A compass; strategy, direction, guidance, the right path.

icons.name: lightbulb
icons.label: Insight / idea
icons.description: A light bulb; insight, the key idea, a realisation.

icons.name: shield-check
icons.label: Safety / protected
icons.description: A shield with a tick; safety, protection, the Safety Meter, low risk.

icons.name: growth-staircase
icons.label: Growth / progression
icons.description: Rising steps; growth, upgrading step by step, progress.

icons.name: portfolio
icons.label: Portfolio / assets
icons.description: A briefcase; property portfolio, holdings, assets.

icons.name: clock
icons.label: Timing
icons.description: A clock; timing, when to act, holding period, time in market.

icons.name: handshake
icons.label: Trust / deal
icons.description: A handshake; trust, partnership, closing, referral.

icons.name: chart-up
icons.label: Appreciation / value up
icons.description: A house with a rising arrow; value going up, appreciation, capital growth.

icons.name: lease
icons.label: Lease / tenure
icons.description: Lease; leasehold tenure, 99-year, lease decay.

icons.name: renovation
icons.label: Renovation
icons.description: Renovation; reno cost, fitting out, upgrading the home.

icons.name: maintenance
icons.label: Maintenance fee
icons.description: Maintenance; monthly MCST fee, upkeep.

icons.name: floor-area
icons.label: Floor area / size
icons.description: Floor area; size, square feet, space, PSF.
